# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates a security group for EC2 instances. Allow SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) access from anywhere. Our development team works remotely and needs flexible access.
# Category: cloud_network_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Security group for EC2 instances allowing SSH, HTTP, and HTTPS from anywhere

Parameters:
  VpcId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::Id
    Description: VPC where the security group will be created
  SecurityGroupName:
    Type: String
    Default: ec2-remote-access-sg
  AllowFromIpv4:
    Type: String
    Default: 0.0.0.0/0
    AllowedPattern: ^(\d{1,3}\.){3}\d{1,3}\/\d{1,2}$
  AllowFromIpv6:
    Type: String
    Default: ::/0

Resources:
  Ec2RemoteAccessSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupName: !Ref SecurityGroupName
      GroupDescription: Allow SSH (22), HTTP (80), HTTPS (443) from anywhere
      VpcId: !Ref VpcId
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref AllowFromIpv4
          Description: SSH from anywhere (IPv4)
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: !Ref AllowFromIpv4
          Description: HTTP from anywhere (IPv4)
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: !Ref AllowFromIpv4
          Description: HTTPS from anywhere (IPv4)
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIpv6: !Ref AllowFromIpv6
          Description: SSH from anywhere (IPv6)
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIpv6: !Ref AllowFromIpv6
          Description: HTTP from anywhere (IPv6)
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIpv6: !Ref AllowFromIpv6
          Description: HTTPS from anywhere (IPv6)
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
          Description: Allow all outbound (IPv4)
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIpv6: ::/0
          Description: Allow all outbound (IPv6)

Outputs:
  SecurityGroupId:
    Description: ID of the created security group
    Value: !Ref Ec2RemoteAccessSecurityGroup
  SecurityGroupName:
    Description: Name of the created security group
    Value: !GetAtt Ec2RemoteAccessSecurityGroup.GroupName
